steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: To “emphasize the order” means making clear which student attended BEFORE the other. The chronological relationship must be explicitly shown, not just implied.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows the sequence
steps.content: Choice C uses the word preceded to show Koch-Otte attended before Stern, making their order unmistakable. The other three either omit this comparison, focus on directors, or mention only one student. That matches choice C — C is correct.
